note: Arcade contract addresses on Arc testnet, kept in sync with the Vercel NEXT_PUBLIC_* env block. Update both files after every DeployTestnet redeploy.

notes.seedETH: Standalone testnet ERC20 ('Ether (Seed)', symbol 'ETH', 18 decimals, 1,000,000 supply) deployed 2026-06-04 at block 45,493,309, tx 0xa7f46c56de4c3b87663a61018891d55a8ec0e332801e2033b245b4dd69ed6ce5. No USDC/ETH pair exists yet; seed via the frontend (/positions -> + New position -> paste the address above) so the live factory creates the pair and the front-end picks it up automatically.
notes.v2Zap: ArcadeV2Zap deployed 2026-06-04 at block 45,506,023 (tx 0x2dbd119f0a2fb883107296414bf4dd906edb31addf29cfcd77070a0afc7945e9). Wired to live V2 factory + router. To enable the Single Asset Zap tab in /positions/add, set NEXT_PUBLIC_V2_ZAP_ADDRESS=0x50D8f7311F052022b59792527e5599026D1b1Fc6 in Vercel (Production + Preview).
notes.v3NPM: User-permissioned V3 add-liquidity is deferred: the CLANKER_V3 stack only exposes the locker (used by the launchpad to seed migrated tokens) - there is no NonfungiblePositionManager. Shipping V3 mint requires either a) deploying Uniswap v3-periphery's NPM, b) writing a thin mint wrapper that handles the v3 mint callback. Track this with the explore Concentrated Liquidity filter; until the NPM lands the CreatePoolModal V3 branch hands off to /positions/add which currently renders the V2 form (the type=v3 query param is preserved so the page can flip once NPM is wired).
